post.description: Creates or updates age, gender, height, weight, body type and goal. All fields are optional.

get.summary: Check if user needs to fill body metrics or diet data

post.description: Creates or updates target calories, protein, carbs, fat, and fiber. All fields are optional.
For mobile clients to authenticate using Google ID token

get.description: Returns the recommended workout plan for today. Returns null if workout preferences are not set.
Returns all available workout sessions with their exercises
Returns a list of all available exercises from the database
Returns the stored workout preferences for the authenticated user

post.description: Creates or updates workout preferences. All fields are optional — send only what you want to change.

get.summary: Get all workout sessions for the authenticated user
Get all workout logs for the authenticated user

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.

get.summary: Get daily nutritional status (target vs consumed)

get.description: Returns the diet plan for today (both suggestion text and structured items). Returns null if not yet available.

get.summary: Search for food items by name

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format. Defaults to today.

get.summary: Get meals for a specific date

post.description: Creates or updates dietary preference, daily water intake, and meals per day. All fields optional.

Save a meal to the database. The caller provides the food items with their nutritional info directly (no AI involved). Use POST /diet/ai/food first to get the nutritional breakdown from AI, then call this endpoint to save.

Upload a food image and/or provide a text description. The AI (OpenAI or Gemini, controlled by AI_PROVIDER env) identifies each food item and returns calories, carbs, protein, fat, and fiber. Nothing is saved to the database.

400.description: Neither image nor description was provided.

get.summary: Get last 1 week of sleep data

bodyMetricsNeeded.description: True if age, gender, height, weight, or goal are missing

dietDataNeeded.description: True if dietary preference or meals per day are missing

idToken.description: Google ID token from Android client

content.example: Push day focused on upper body strength

sessionId.description: Optional session ID if this log is part of a session

logData.description: JSON array of exercise performance data
JSON array of exercise performance data

data.description: Array of food items with nutritional info
Array of food items with their nutritional info

image.description: Image of the food (JPEG/PNG). At least one of image or description is required.

description.example: 2 boiled eggs and a slice of whole wheat toast
description.description: Text description of the food. At least one of image or description is required.

name.description: A short, descriptive name for the meal

description.example: A healthy mix of grilled chicken breast and fresh leafy greens.
description.description: A brief description of the meal
